lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello! Who are you?

lines.speaker: Raqueel
lines.text: Hi! My name is Raqueel. I work as a barmaid here in the clan hall. My friend, Gem, over there works here too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Really? I don't recall hiring you.

lines.speaker: Raqueel
lines.text: Wait, seriously? I could have sworn someone did. Oh no, Gem won't take this well.

lines.speaker: Raqueel
lines.text: Either way, I have beer! Would you like to buy some?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to buy some beer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thank you.

lines.speaker: Raqueel
lines.text: That's alright. Just make sure your friends buy plenty of beer. If you're not paying my wages, we'll have to rely on commission!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll keep that in mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi again, Raqueel.

lines.speaker: Raqueel
lines.text: Oh hii! I just finished telling Gem about this time I was working with some geese. Ah, how time has flown since then. Anyway, what can I help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi again, Raqueel.

lines.speaker: Raqueel
lines.text: Oh hii! I was in the middle of singing this new song to Gem. She doesn't seem to like it much. Anyway, what can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi again, Raqueel.

lines.speaker: Raqueel
lines.text: Oh hii! I just thinking how I wish I had a pork and blue cheese pie right now. Mm-mmm. Anyway, how can I help?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to buy some beer.

lines.speaker: Raqueel
lines.text: Yay! That will be 5 coins, please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh dear, I don't seem to have enough money.

lines.speaker: Raqueel
lines.text: That's alright. Come back when you do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No way, that's too expensive.

lines.speaker: Raqueel
lines.text: Look, I don't choose the prices here. I'm just trying to make a living selling beer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's fair enough.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about yourself.

lines.speaker: Raqueel
lines.text: You want to know about me? Oh where do I begin. Let's see...

lines.speaker: Raqueel
lines.text: Gem, my friend over there, isn't actually called Gem. I came up with that name for her. It suits her, don't you think?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fascinating. Thank you for sharing.

lines.speaker: Raqueel
lines.text: Sometimes, when the hall is empty, I like to stand up on the railing and pretend I'm singing at a stage in front of many people.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fascinating. Thank you for sharing.

lines.speaker: Raqueel
lines.text: My favourite colour is purple!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fascinating. Thank you for sharing.

lines.speaker: Raqueel
lines.text: I used to work with geese. One day they attacked me and since then I have had serious trust issues with them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fascinating. Thank you for sharing.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have to go. Good bye.

lines.speaker: Raqueel
lines.text: See you later!
